pageSubtitle: Create and explore agents with tailored instructions and diverse skills
agentsNotAvailableDescription: Agents aren't enabled for this workspace yet. Please contact your administrator to get access.
deleteAgentSubtitle: You won't be able to recover it once deleted.
configureResponseStyleDescription: Set the style and tone this agent uses when responding
defineHowAgentResponds: Define how this agent should respond to queries
defineComplexityLevel: Define the complexity level of responses
dataPresentationDescription: Set the style and tone {brandShortName} uses when responding.
dataPresentationStatisticsHeavyDescripti: Full of charts, tables and quantitative analysis.
dataPresentationNarrativeFocusedDescript: Emphasizes on the story or explanation behind the data
syncFileWeeklyTooltip: Wald will sync this file every week
deleteDocumentTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
externalUrlsDescription: Give your agent specific URLs to search a specific page or subdirectory.
invalidUrlOrUnableToScrape: Invalid URL or unable to scrape content from this URL
noContentFoundAtUrl: No content found at this URL
failedToAddUrl: Failed to add URL. Please try again.
externalUrlDisclaimer: The agent will only access the exact URL provided and won't crawl dynamic content on the page. To include more pages, please enter each URL individually.
onlyJpgPngAllowed: Only JPG, JPEG and PNG images are allowed
maintenanceDescription: We are performing scheduled maintenance on custom agents. Please check back later.
recommendedImageSize: Recommended size is 70x70px. Max size is 5MB.
uploadDocToUploadProfileImage: Please upload a doc to upload profile image
describeAssistantLabel: Describe what your assistant can do
shareWithTeamDescription: Everyone in the team can access this Assistant
deleteAssistantTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this assistant?
failedShareContactAdmin: Failed to share document. Please contact your team admin.
knowledgeSourceDescription: Upload your custom knowledge for the assistant to use when answering. Maximum total file size: 500 MB.
knowledgeBasePrivateMobile: The data will only be accessed by this assistant.
knowledgeBasePrivateDesktop: The data will only be accessed by this assistant. Other assistants cannot access it unless you explicitly grant permission. {brandShortName} does not store or retain any information from this knowledge source.
filesUploadingBackground: Your files are uploading in the background and will shortly be available
waitUntilProcessed: Please wait until all your files are processed to create the assistant
editCustomAgentDescription: Modify your agent's settings and knowledge sources
createCustomAgentDescription: Build a custom AI agent that answers team-related or specific knowledge source queries.
giveAgentPersonality: Give your agent a personality with a name and avatar
name: Name
describeWhatAgentCanDo: Describe what your agent can do
helpTeamUnderstand: Help your team members understand what this agent can do
descriptionPlaceholder: "I can help answer questions on Company policies" or "Analyze large volumes of data and create reports"
agentInstructionsDescription: Add instructions to control how the agent responds, including rules and guardrails.
agentInstructionsPlaceholder:
• Avoid saying thank you, please etc...
• Use prompts like 'do not generate your own responses outside the given instructions...

filesFailedToUpload: {count} file(s) failed to upload. Please try again.
failedToUploadFiles: Failed to upload files. Please try again.
missingEncryptionKeys: Missing encryption keys. Please refresh and try again.
failedToCreateAgent: Failed to create agent. Please try again.
failedToShareAgentWithTeam: Failed to share agent with team
pleaseEnterAgentName: Please enter a name for your agent
agentNotReady: Agent not ready. Please complete the steps or try again.
failedToUpdateAgent: Failed to update agent. Please try again.
failedToShareAgentContactAdmin: Failed to share agent. Please contact your team admin.
knowledgeBaseProcessingDescription: Your files are being uploaded and will shortly be available. Please wait until the process is complete to create the agent.
errorFileExceedsSingleLimit: One or more files exceed the size limit of 100 MB
errorFileExceedsTypeLimit: "{fileName}" exceeds the {limit} size limit for this file type
errorTotalSizeExceedsLimit: Total file size exceeds the limit of {limit}
gcpRagStatusDraftTooltip: Draft — finish setup to build the knowledge base
gcpRagStatusDraftWithCorpusTooltip: Draft — finish editing to update the knowledge base
